title: Frozen LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS map (D32)
why: A deeply-frozen, exact map: key set is exactly {module, node:module}; each value is exactly the sorted pair ["builtinModules", "isBuiltin"]. This bounds which builtin loader-capable exports are treated as safe references, and must not drift.
non_claim: This does not grant a sandbox or prove loader containment; it is an exact reference map (see clotho/memory/NON-CLAIMS.md#no-loader-containment).
change_rule: Changing the map requires a plan amendment, TELOS re-authorization, and updated deep-equal/deep-freeze/mutation units.
